---
title: "Trial Coefficient Emotion Plots"
format: html
---

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import display, Image

results_dir = Path("results")

for folder in sorted(results_dir.iterdir()):
    plot = folder / "plot_item_coef.png"
    if plot.exists():
        print(f"### {folder.name}")
        display(Image(filename=str(plot)))
```


```{python}
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import display, Image

results_dir = Path("experiment")

for folder in sorted(results_dir.iterdir()):
    if folder.name.startswith("Doasisfull"):
        continue
    plot = folder / "validate_attention_s0.png"
    if plot.exists():
        print(f"### {folder.name}")
        display(Image(filename=str(plot)))
```




```{python}
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import display, Image

results_dir = Path("results")

for folder in sorted(results_dir.iterdir()):
    plot = folder / "cor_item_level.png"
    if plot.exists():
        print(f"### {folder.name}")
        display(Image(filename=str(plot)))
```
